name: @pyreon/example-native-tasks
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — Gap 5 multi-feature showcase. Tasks app exercising routing + auth-gate + state-machine + i18n + canonical primitives via PMTC. SINGLE source compiles to web + iOS + Android.

scripts.build: bun run build:swift && bun run build:kotlin
scripts.lint: echo '[native-tasks] no TS lint surface; skipping'
scripts.test: echo '[native-tasks] no test surface; PMTC emit covered by @pyreon/native-compiler tests'
scripts.typecheck: echo '[native-tasks] @ts-nocheck on source; PMTC handles typing'
